svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: RTT を構成する 4 つの遅延要素

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 97px; margin-left: 77px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #2e5cb8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2e5cb8, #7ca4f3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 138px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 時間 ＝ パケットサイズ ÷ 回線帯域

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 172px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
NIC がパケットを最後のビットまで回線に押し出すのに要する時間。
1 Gbps の回線に 1500 byte のパケットを載せるなら約 12 µs。
帯域を増やすか、パケットを小さくすると短縮できる。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 97px; margin-left: 517px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3a8a3a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3a8a3a, #589d58); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 138px; margin-left: 516px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 時間 ＝ 距離 ÷ 伝送速度（≒ 光速の 2/3）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 172px; margin-left: 522px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
ビットが物理媒体上を移動する時間。地理距離に比例する物理下限。
東京 ↔ 大阪 (≒ 400 km) で往復 約 4 ms、東京 ↔ 米西海岸で約 100 ms。
回線を増速しても短縮できない（距離と光速は変わらない）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 327px; margin-left: 77px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7a5d00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7a5d00, #b79e4e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ③ キューイング遅延 (Queuing Delay)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 368px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 時間 ＝ 経路上ルータの送信バッファで待つ時間の総和

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 402px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
ルータのバッファに先着のパケットが並んでいる場合、自分が送出されるまで
待機する時間。経路の混雑度に応じて変動し、RTT の揺らぎ（ジッタ）の
主要因となる。輻輳が深まるとパケット破棄（Tail Drop, AQM）も発生する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 327px; margin-left: 517px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #b45a00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#b45a00, #d88a3d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 368px; margin-left: 516px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 時間 ＝ ルータ・エンドポイント CPU での処理時間

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 402px; margin-left: 522px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
パケットの宛先を調べ転送経路を決定する時間（ルータ）、
あるいは上位プロトコルで要求を解釈し応答を組み立てる時間（サーバ）。
現代のハードウェアでは µs オーダーが一般的だが、TLS 復号や重い処理で伸びる。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 77px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #8a1a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8a1a1a, #ffaeae); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 582px; margin-left: 490px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: RTT ≈ 2 × ( 送信遅延 ＋ 伝播遅延 ＋ キューイング遅延 ) ＋ 処理遅延（両端）
